Okay, what's everyone? So, the close. So what we're about to tell you may not make a lot of sense but all I can tell you is that like right now, like the world that I'm in in the internet marketing world is like astounded by how good we are what we do and they're like, your stats don't make any sense. Like every single person is trying to like hack our process and so I'm giving this to you, okay? Now it may not make sense what I'm saying but basically what we do is like all the set sequence that we just went through, we're literally going to repeat the exact same sequence again when they come in person. So like instead of having a setter and a closer in terms of different scripts, they're actually identical scripts but the only thing that the setter really does is it reinforces the positioning of the closer which makes which allows you to jack the value, okay? From what you're charging them. But the other thing is that like I think that having a setter who doesn't have teeth, like it delutes the effectiveness of what's possible, right? And so if you had two all-star closers, you really just want to close them twice. You know what I mean? It's like having someone watching a webinar on like this amazing thing and then again watch another webinar that's different but the same on the same thing. They're like already sold but then they're gonna be more sold. So like we want the setter to construct the sale. Like it's still like you need to get them to confront. Like they are closing. They're just not asking for the whole sale but they're going to get them to say yes I want to buy it at that price but they're not gonna ask for the money. And so that's the luxury of having this two-step is that you get, you literally can go full court press on the prospect during this closing because you're not gonna ask them for the money. Which is like an amazing luxury which is why this setup, the way we have set it up works so well. I've never heard of anyone else doing it this way. Okay so there is a close. You are gonna ask for a credit card but it's not for the full amount or anything like that. So I'll let Leila go into it. I just wanted to have that as a preface for like why this works so well. Okay so I'll get to her doing the clue sequence in one second.
